meta.title: Custom Cakes
meta.description: Sculptural bespoke cakes from Carlo's Bakery Brasil. Weddings, birthdays, and events—with the Valastro tradition.

hero.headline: Your moment, sculpted in sugar.
hero.subhead: From the Valastro family to your wedding, birthday, or corporate event. Each cake is a unique work of art, handmade by our master pastry chefs.

occasions.heading: A cake worthy of your moment.
occasions.subhead: We work across five main categories—always personalised for you.

wedding.title: Weddings
wedding.description: Tier cakes, classic or contemporary design.

birthday.title: Birthdays
birthday.description: From kids to grown-ups—every milestone deserves its cake.

corporate.title: Corporate
corporate.description: Company events, product launches, and special milestones.

special.title: Special editions
special.description: Themed cakes, sculptural cakes, and character designs.

gallery.heading: Edible works of art.
gallery.subhead: A selection of some of the most unforgettable creations signed by Carlo's Brasil.

process.heading: From dream to cake in four steps.
process.subhead: A careful process to make sure every detail is perfect.

01.title: Conversation
01.description: Tell us about your event, theme, and guest count via the form or WhatsApp.

02.title: Briefing
02.description: Our team replies within 24 hours to clarify details, palette, and references.

03.title: Creation
03.description: You'll receive a custom sketch—we approve every detail together before production.

04.title: Delivery
04.description: We bake 7 to 30 days ahead (depending on size) and deliver to your venue.

marina.quote: Our wedding cake was the talk of the party. Buddy sets a standard no other confectionery in Brazil can match.
marina.name: Marina & Rafael

pedro.quote: We ordered a corporate cake for our company launch—flawless. Every client was impressed.
pedro.name: Pedro Almeida

silva.quote: João's first birthday cake was exactly what we dreamed. Thoughtful service from start to finish.
silva.name: Silva family

form.heading: Request your quote.
form.subhead: Fill in the form and our team will get back to you within 24 business hours.

fields.messagePlaceholder: Theme, colour palette, references, dietary restrictions...
fields.lgpd: I agree to be contacted about my quote.

success.title: We've received your request
success.body: We'll be in touch shortly. Thank you for trusting Carlo's Bakery.

errors.phone: Please enter a valid WhatsApp number.
errors.eventDateMin: The date must be at least 14 days from today.
errors.guests: Please select the number of guests.

leadTime.question: How far in advance should I enquire?
leadTime.answer: We recommend at least 14 days for simpler cakes and 30+ days for sculptural or wedding cakes.

pricing.question: What's the typical investment?
pricing.answer: Custom cakes start at R$800. Pricing depends on complexity, size, and theme.

delivery.question: Do you deliver to the venue?
delivery.answer: Yes—in São Paulo and the metropolitan region. Ask us about other cities.

tasting.question: Can I taste before I order?
tasting.answer: Yes—we offer tastings by appointment at our shop.

dietary.question: Do you accommodate dietary restrictions?
dietary.answer: Yes—we offer gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegan options. Please note them on the form.

payment.question: How does payment work?
payment.answer: 50% to start production and the remaining 50% up to 7 days before the event.

finalCta.heading: Ready to design your cake?
finalCta.subhead: Count on 115 years of Italian tradition for life's biggest moments.
